# Revealed in Wrath

> [!danger] ⚔️ Event · Cost: **1** · Tactics

![[12061.png]]

---

Play only if you control a **_Noldor_** hero.
**Action:** Choose a non-unique enemy. Until the end of the phase, treat the chosen enemy's printed text box as if it were blank (except for **_Traits_**).
